_readme: DMS Frontend Design System — based on reference dashboard aesthetic. Give this file to Copilot at the start of every frontend phase. It defines every visual decision: tokens, components, layout, motion, and Angular Material overrides.

colorTokens._usage: Use CSS custom properties everywhere. Never hardcode hex values in components.

page.comment: Warm off-white page background — not pure white, not gray. Creates contrast with white cards.

surface.comment: Cards are pure white on the warm canvas. Border is a whisper, not a line.

accent.comment: Coral-red from reference image. Used for: CTA buttons, active nav, KPI highlights, chart primary series, badges, progress fills.

status.comment: Status chips — always light background + dark same-family text. Never bright bg + white text.

ageing.comment: Stock ageing heatmap colors — used in dashboard table cells and ageing bar chart.

chart.comment: Coral primary, black secondary, warm neutrals for tertiary. Grid lines are invisible-light.

typography._comment: DM Sans — clean, modern, slightly geometric. Feels premium without being cold. DM Mono for VINs, IDs, codes, masked values. Same design family keeps it cohesive.

display.usage: Page hero numbers — total stock count, KPI values

body.usage: Default body text, table cell content

mono.usage: VINs, IDs, masked values, code values

kpi.usage: Dashboard KPI numbers — large, bold, prominent

numerals.comment: All numbers in tables, KPIs, and charts must use tabular numerals for alignment.

spacing._comment: 4px grid. All spacing values are multiples of 4.

borderRadius.comment: Card radius is 20px — the defining shape of the design. Chips and tags are fully pill-shaped.

shadows.comment: Cards have almost no shadow — they rely on background contrast. Buttons get coral-tinted shadow.

sidenav.comment: Dark sidenav creates strong contrast with white cards. Collapsed by default (icon-only). Logo is coral square matching accent.

topbar.comment: Topbar blends into the page canvas. Contains breadcrumb, search, notifications, avatar.

kpiCard.comment: Small KPI card — icon top-left, big number middle, delta bottom-right

chartCard.comment: Card with embedded chart — header with title + period selector, chart fills remaining height

tableCard.comment: Card containing a data table — header with title + filter pill row + search

activityCard.comment: Card with vertical timeline feed of recent events

pill.comment: Period selectors in cards use this compact pill variant

chip.variants: Use colorTokens.status for each vehicle status chip

progressBar.comment: PDI completion progress, target vs achievement bars

legend.comment: No legend inside chart. Use custom HTML legend below card.

ageingBar.comment: Stock ageing dashboard — 4 bars, each a different ageing color

statusDonut.comment: KPI donut — Available vs total. Center shows percentage.

stockTrendLine.comment: Dashboard sparkline — stock received vs invoiced per week

branchDoughnut.comment: Branch stock distribution. One segment per branch.

dashboard.comment: Inventory Dashboard — bento grid layout using CSS Grid

structure: top-left: category icon in coral bg rounded square
top-right: trend badge (up arrow + % green | down arrow + % red)
kpiCard.animation: Count up from 0 on page load — 800ms easeOutQuart

motion._philosophy: Motion is functional, not decorative. Animations guide attention and confirm actions.

pageEnter.comment: Staggered card reveal on route navigate

kpiCountUp.comment: Use requestAnimationFrame loop — count from 0 to target value on component init

statusChipChange.comment: When status changes via WebSocket, the chip scales briefly

rowHighlight.comment: New row added via WebSocket — flash highlight then fade

angularMaterialOverrides._comment: Paste scssVariables into styles.scss. Apply all token overrides to the Angular Material theme.

componentOverrides.mat-card: Remove default elevation and border-radius. Apply card tokens.
componentOverrides.mat-form-field: Appearance fill. Background #F4F3F0. BorderRadius 10px. Remove underline. Label always above.
componentOverrides.mat-table: Apply table tokens. Header 12px uppercase #6B6B68. Row height 52px. Hover bg rgba(232,93,58,0.03).
componentOverrides.mat-chip: Apply chip tokens. Replace Material blue with status colors from colorTokens.status.
componentOverrides.mat-button: Apply button tokens. Ripple color #E85D3A at 0.12 opacity.
componentOverrides.mat-paginator: Apply paginator tokens. Active page button coral filled.

inventoryList.layout: Full-width table card. Filter panel above table as horizontal chip row. Search left, export button right.
inventoryList.filterRow: Active filters shown as dismissible chips (coral background). 'Clear all' ghost button far right.
inventoryList.vinDisplay: Always DM Mono font. Gray secondary color. Full 17-char VIN always shown in lists.
inventoryList.statusColumn: Chip component using colorTokens.status. Always has colored dot + uppercase text.
inventoryList.ageColumn: Color-coded text: green under 30d, amber 31-60d, orange 61-90d, red over 90d. Bold if over 60d.
inventoryList.actionColumn: Icon buttons 36px — view, edit, hold. Show only actions the user role permits via hasPermission directive.

vehicleDetail.layout: Two-column grid. Left 8/12: main info cards. Right 4/12: status timeline + quick actions.
vehicleDetail.vin: Large DM Mono 18px in hero card — most prominent element.
vehicleDetail.statusTimeline: Vertical stepper — completed steps coral filled, current coral ring, future gray.
vehicleDetail.photoGallery: PDI photos in horizontal scroll — 120px square thumbnails, 12px radius, click to modal.

adminUsers.layout: Full-width table card. Create user CTA top-right (primary coral button).
adminUsers.drawerForm: Right-side drawer 480px — slides over content. Has own scrollbar.
adminUsers.passwordField: type=password with show/hide toggle. Eye icon in coral when focused.
adminUsers.roleSelect: Custom role selector showing role name + colored badge, not plain dropdown.

login.layout: Split screen — left 55% coral gradient, right 45% white card centered.
login.title: 'Welcome back' 24px 600 dark. Subtitle 'Sign in to continue' 14px secondary.
login.submitButton: Full width, 44px height, coral, 'Sign in'. Loading spinner inside on submit.

leftPanel.content: White DMS logo top-left. Center: 32px white bold headline. Bottom: 3 feature callouts in white.
leftPanel.patternOverlay: Subtle geometric dot pattern at 8% white opacity over gradient

rolePermissionMatrix.layout: Left: 5 role cards as vertical list. Right panel: permission grid + menu tree on role select.
rolePermissionMatrix.permissionGrid: Angular Material table — rows = modules, columns = C/R/U/D. Each cell = styled mat-slide-toggle in coral.
rolePermissionMatrix.menuTree: Angular CDK Tree with checkboxes. Indent child items 20px per level.
rolePermissionMatrix.saveBanner: Fixed bottom bar in right panel: 'Changes take effect immediately' + Save button.

auditLog.layout: Full-width table card. Columns: timestamp, user, role badge, module, action (color-coded), entity ID, before/after diff.
auditLog.diffViewer: Inline collapsed JSON diff — changed keys highlighted coral, removed keys red, added keys green.

copilotInstructions._critical: Read these instructions before generating any component. They are non-negotiable.
doAlways: Add the DM Sans + DM Mono Google Fonts @import to styles.scss — both must load before Angular bootstraps
Set body { font-family: var(--dms-font); background: var(--dms-canvas); margin: 0; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } in styles.scss
Paste the full scssVariables block from angularMaterialOverrides into styles.scss as the first thing after the import
Apply border-radius: var(--dms-card-radius) to EVERY mat-card override — default mat-card radius must be overridden globally
Use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums on ALL number displays — KPIs, tables, quantities, prices
Use var(--dms-mono) font for every VIN, vehicle ID, code value, masked value, and currency amount in tables
Apply the coral accent --dms-accent ONLY to: primary buttons, active nav item, chart primary series, status chip dots, KPI icon backgrounds, focus rings, progress bar fills
Animate KPI numbers counting up from 0 on component init — 800ms easeOutQuart using requestAnimationFrame
Use staggered fadeSlideUp on dashboard cards — 60ms delay between each card, triggered once on component init
Every table row must show only the action buttons the current user role is permitted to use — use *hasPermission directive
Apply the bento grid layout to the dashboard using CSS Grid with the 12-column slot definitions from dashboard.bentoGrid.slots
The sidenav background must be #111110 (dark) — it creates the essential contrast with the white cards
The page canvas background must be #F4F3F0 (warm off-white) everywhere — never pure white for the page bg
Every mat-form-field must use the fill appearance with background #F4F3F0 and border-radius 10px
Filter chips above tables must use the dismissible chip pattern from colorTokens.status
doNever: Never use Inter, Roboto, system-ui, or any other font family — ONLY DM Sans for UI and DM Mono for codes
Never use purple, blue, or green as the primary UI accent — the ONLY accent color is coral #E85D3A
Never use #FFFFFF as the page background — white is ONLY for card surfaces
Never use Angular Material default blue as the primary theme color — override to #E85D3A
Never apply mat-elevation-z4 or heavier on cards — use the card shadow token only
Never use border-radius less than 20px on card components
Never display a VIN in any font other than DM Mono
Never render a data table without the filter chip row and search bar above it
Never use mat-table default styling without applying all table override tokens
Never hardcode a hex color in any component .scss file — always reference CSS custom properties from the :root block
Never use Angular Material's default underline mat-form-field appearance — always fill with rounded corners
Never show a status without the corresponding color from colorTokens.status — no plain text status values
